parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514', max_tokens: 4096, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'You are a content strategist for Ikigai Studio, a tech consultancy in Panama specializing in automation, AI, WhatsApp, voice agents, and AI SEO. Generate a NEW blog article. Existing article slugs (do NOT repeat these topics): ' + JSON.parse($json.data).map(a => a.slug).join(', ') + ' Write a complete article in BOTH Spanish and English. Target audience: business owners in Central America (Panama, Costa Rica, Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras). Style: Professional but accessible. Use tú (informal) in Spanish. Include real numbers, costs, percentages. 800-1200 words per language. Structure: Hook opening → 3-5 H2 sections → practical examples with costs → subtle CTA Return ONLY a JSON object (no markdown fences) with this structure: { "slug": "kebab-case-in-spanish", "title": { "es": "...", "en": "..." }, "description": { "es": "max 160 chars", "en": "max 160 chars" }, "category": { "es": "...", "en": "..." }, "readTime": "X min", "body": { "es": "

HTML...

", "en": "

HTML...

" } } Categories to choose from: Automatización/Automation, Inteligencia Artificial/AI, WhatsApp, Voice AI, AI SEO, Casos/Case Studies HTML rules for body: Use h2, h3, p, ul/ol/li, strong, table/tr/th/td. No h1, no images.' }] }) }}

parameters.command: cd /Users/Targo/Downloads/ikigai-mockup && git add -A && git commit -m "New article: {{ $('Format & Save Draft').first().json.article.title.es }}" && git push
